title: krameria secundiflora var. lanceolata
intro: Krameria secundiflora var. lanceolata, also known as Ratanhia or Krameria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Krameria genus and is native to South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and improve wound healing. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. Krameria secundiflora var. lanceolata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in some commercial products, including oral care products and supplements.
